name_cn:
Genuine quality
New arrival 🅰️🅰️ When talking about the 24 Fall/Winter show, you will definitely be grabbed by the eye by the mirror-like various items 👁️ Clean, elegant lines. Minimalist design and silhouette intersect. If you can only choose one piece, then you must choose this TERENCE. The iconic TRIOMPHE logo element, gentle and elegant. Patent calfskin, unique luster and recognizability. -Small and interesting shape, can be carried by hand or on the shoulder ❇️
TRIOMPHE snap closure, 1 main compartment
1 interior flat pocket
1 adjustable leather handle
Model No.: 118313
Color: Mirror Black (with original packaging)
Dimensions: 20.5x5.5x11
